title: Secrets, Dependencies, Static Analysis, and Supply Chain · Failure Case: Artifact Provenance
summary: Build layered security gates for source, dependencies, workflows, and releases. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates artifact provenance increment in a secure-development gate stack. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Record build provenance, checksums, signatures, and dependency inventories when risk requires.
Pin and minimize CI actions, tokens, permissions, and untrusted-code exposure.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Artifact Provenance evidence
steps.instruction: Append a gates-artifact-provenance-11p2ws: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
